title: crepis praemorsa
intro: Crepis praemorsa, also known as hawk's beard or rough hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Crepis praemorsa is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent.
